home.layout.description.message: Lantern watches your whole house — zones, motion, arm/disarm — without ever raising its voice.
home.layout.description.description: Front page layout description (meta description for SEO)

home.hero.eyebrow.description: Front page hero eyebrow above the heading

home.hero.tagline.message: Lantern watches your whole house — zones, motion, arm/disarm — without ever raising its voice. Every room, every door, every quiet moment, held gently.
home.hero.tagline.description: Front page hero tagline beneath the heading

home.features.zones.title.description: Front page Features card title for Zones

home.features.zones.description.message: Group devices by where they live — perimeter, interior, sleeping areas. Arm any zone independently. Disarm gently, by name. Lantern never raises its voice.
home.features.zones.description.description: Front page Features card description for Zones

home.features.motionEvents.title.description: Front page Features card title for Motion Events

home.features.motionEvents.description.message: Every motion passes through the event stream with direction and an optional confidence band. Replay, filter, hand off to a hub. Nothing is dropped.
home.features.motionEvents.description.description: Front page Features card description for Motion Events

home.features.contactSensors.title.description: Front page Features card title for Contact Sensors

home.features.contactSensors.description.message: Door opened, window held, gate closed — each contact event is timestamped and stored in a quiet ledger. Browse sensor history without leaving the room.
home.features.contactSensors.description.description: Front page Features card description for Contact Sensors

home.features.armDisarm.title.description: Front page Features card title for Arm / Disarm

home.features.armDisarm.description.message: Arm or disarm by zone, by user, or by schedule. Hand off control to someone you trust — by name, by passphrase, or by HomeKit Home Hub presence.
home.features.armDisarm.description.description: Front page Features card description for Arm / Disarm

home.features.deviceDiscovery.title.description: Front page Features card title for Device Discovery

home.features.deviceDiscovery.descriptio.message: Lantern finds every sensor and contact device on your hub automatically. No manual pairing, no configuration files. It discovers what is already there.
home.features.deviceDiscovery.descriptio.description: Front page Features card description for Device Discovery

home.features.sensorHistory.title.description: Front page Features card title for Sensor History

home.features.sensorHistory.description.message: A quiet ledger of everything that happened — motion, contact, arm states — sorted by zone and time. Scroll back through a week without leaving the dashboard.
home.features.sensorHistory.description.description: Front page Features card description for Sensor History

showcase.spotlightCode.description.message: Three commands to go from zero to a watched house.

showcase.item.spotlightText.title.description: Showcase item title for Spotlight (with text variant)

showcase.spotlightText.description.message: Lantern discovers every device on your hub, groups them by zone, and streams every motion and contact event to the event log. Arm states are persistent — power off, power on, the zone remembers.

showcase.item.blogPreviewWithDesc.title.description: Showcase item title for BlogPreview (with description variant)

showcase.blogPreviewWithDesc.description.message: Updates, patterns, and quiet notes from the house.

showcase.blogPreviewWithDesc.post1.title.message: Watching from another room without the house knowing

showcase.blogPreviewWithDesc.post1.descr.message: A household member upstairs should know the front door is closed without sending the dog a notification. Lantern routes events by audience, not by event type.

showcase.blogPreviewWithDesc.post2.title.message: Six months of perimeter motion, in one picture

showcase.blogPreviewWithDesc.post2.descr.message: A motion sensor on the front porch fires forty times a day. Most of those are squirrels. Lantern's history view is where the squirrels become a pattern.

showcase.blogPreviewWithDesc.post3.title.message: Handing off arm/disarm to someone you trust

showcase.blogPreviewWithDesc.post3.descr.message: A trusted user can disarm any zone Lantern watches without your phone in their hand. By name, passphrase, or HomeKit presence.

showcase.item.blogPreviewNoDesc.title.description: Showcase item title for BlogPreview (no description variant)

showcase.blogPreviewNoDesc.post1.title.message: Lantern 2.4: Lens Floor-Plan Overlay and Beacon Incremental Runs
showcase.blogPreviewNoDesc.post1.title.description: Showcase BlogPreview (no description) sample post title

showcase.blogPreviewNoDesc.post1.descrip.message: Lens now renders the household zone graph onto a floor plan, and Beacon supports incremental runs that re-evaluate only the sensors that changed.
showcase.blogPreviewNoDesc.post1.descrip.description: Showcase BlogPreview (no description) sample post description

theme.NotFound.bundles.1.description.message: It might have moved, or perhaps it never existed at all.

theme.NotFound.bundles.1.backHomeLabel.description: Random 404 bundle 2 of 5 — CTA label (cartographic voice)

theme.NotFound.bundles.2.title.message: Looks like we lost the trail.

theme.NotFound.bundles.2.description.message: Try heading back to camp or use the search to find your way.

theme.NotFound.bundles.2.backHomeLabel.description: Random 404 bundle 3 of 5 — CTA label (lost-traveler voice)

theme.NotFound.bundles.3.description.message: If something brought you here, the link is probably out of date.

theme.NotFound.bundles.3.backHomeLabel.description: Random 404 bundle 4 of 5 — CTA label (vacant-address voice)

theme.NotFound.bundles.4.title.message: We could not find what you were looking for.

theme.NotFound.bundles.4.description.message: Double-check the URL for typos, or head back to start fresh.

theme.NotFound.bundles.4.backHomeLabel.description: Random 404 bundle 5 of 5 — CTA label (apologetic voice)

theme.blog.authorsList.pageTitle.description: The title of the authors page

theme.docs.sidebar.expandButtonAriaLabel.description: The ARIA label for the button that expands the doc sidebar

theme.docs.sidebar.collapseButtonAriaLab.description: The ARIA label for the button that collapses the doc sidebar

theme.blog.post.plurals.description: Pluralized label for "{count} posts". Use as much plural forms (separated by "|") as your language support (see https://www.unicode.org/cldr/cldr-aux/charts/34/supplemental/language_plural_rules.html)

theme.blog.tagTitle.description: The title of the page for a blog tag

theme.blog.author.pageTitle.description: The title of the page for a blog author

theme.blog.authorsList.viewAll.description: The label of the link targeting the blog authors page

theme.blog.author.noPosts.message: This author has not written any posts yet.
theme.blog.author.noPosts.description: The text for authors with 0 blog post

theme.common.skipToMainContent.description: The skip to content label used for accessibility, allowing to rapidly navigate to main content with keyboard tab/enter navigation

theme.tags.tagsPageTitle.description: The title of the tag list page

theme.footer.copyright.description: Footer copyright text. The {copyright} placeholder receives the consumer's themeConfig.footer.copyright value as the source-locale fallback; per-locale overrides in i18n code.json usually inline their own text.
